clauses.statement: adjudicate prepare generates an adjudication request that contains every acceptance criteria clause full text, the recorded verification evidence (command, summary, observation), the three-verdict vocabulary, and independent fresh-context adversarial instructions.
adjudicate prepare on a story without acceptance criteria fails with an explicit error instead of producing a pass-like artifact, so absence of clauses is never treated as adjudicated.

adjudicate record rejects verdicts outside demonstrated/not_demonstrated/not_verifiable_by_automation, empty reasons, and missing agent-system or agent-id provenance, and binds every accepted verdict to the current HEAD commit.

When the evidence adjudication gate state transitions are evaluated in pr prepare workflow, a clause without a fresh current-head verdict moves the gate status to needs_evidence and the reason lists each missing clause id.
When any clause verdict is not_demonstrated, the gate status transitions to failed and the adjudicator reason is included in the gate reason.

When a clause verdict is not_verifiable_by_automation, the gate demands human verification and only an accepted decision record with source gate:evidence_adjudication:<clause-id>, a reason, and an artifact resolves that clause.
When every clause has a fresh demonstrated verdict the gate passes, and a story with zero clauses yields an explicit not_applicable status rather than a silent pass.

The evidence_adjudication gate is required and critical: while unresolved it keeps overall_status at needs_verification, keeps ready_for_pr_create false, and appears in execution gate blocking_gates so a reason-only waiver cannot pass it.
Setting evidence_adjudication.enabled to false in .vibepro/config.json omits the gate, and pr prepare does not crash for repositories without adjudication artifacts.

diagrams.title: Adjudication delegation workflow process
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Prepare["vibepro adjudicate prepare"] --> Request["adjudication-request.md"]
  Request --> Judge["independent fresh-context subagent"]
  Judge --> Record["vibepro adjudicate record per clause"]
  Record --> Gate["gate:evidence_adjudication in pr prepare"]
  Gate -->|all demonstrated| Passed["passed"]
  Gate -->|not_demonstrated| Failed["failed"]
  Gate -->|not_verifiable_by_automation| Human["human decision record"]
  Human --> Gate

diagrams.title: Gate status state transitions
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> needs_evidence: clauses without fresh verdicts
  needs_evidence --> failed: any not_demonstrated verdict
  needs_evidence --> needs_evidence: not_verifiable_by_automation without accepted human decision
  needs_evidence --> passed: all clauses demonstrated or human-closed
  failed --> needs_evidence: new evidence and re-adjudication
  [*] --> not_applicable: story has no clauses

diagrams.title: Fake-binding threat and control
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Implementer["implementing agent"] -->|records evidence| Evidence["verification evidence"]
  Threat["fake binding: paste clause text into scenario"] --> Evidence
  Evidence --> Adjudicator["independent adjudicator judges semantic fit"]
  Adjudicator --> Control["gate blocks not_demonstrated / missing verdicts"]
  Control --> PR["pr create"]
